title: RDY Hearing: Military Readiness for FY26
text:
CHAIRMAN BERGMAN OPENING STATEMENT
Purpose:
To receive testimony on the current state of military readiness to include military training, weapon systems maintenance, and efforts to meet full spectrum readiness requirements in alignment with the National Defense Strategy.
Witnesses:
General James J. Mingus
Vice Chief of Staff of the Army
Department of the Army
Admiral James W. Kilby
Vice Chief of Naval Operations
Department of the Navy
General Christopher J. Mahoney
Assistant Commandant of the Marine Corps
United States Marine Corps
Lieutenant General Adrian L. Spain
Deputy Chief of Staff for Operations (A3)
Department of the Air Force
General Michael A. Guetlein
Vice Chief of Space Operations
